zh.lifeSummary: 當John Carpenter 'The Younger'於1410年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾時，他的父親Richard Carpenter76歲，母親Christina De Bailleul73歲。他於1439年與Katherine Jennings在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1443年在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞被列為bishop of worcester。他去世於1476年在英國賀特福爾享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦比曉普斯蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Carpenter 'The Younger'于1410年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾时，他的父亲Richard Carpenter76岁，母亲Christina De Bailleul73岁。他于1439年与Katherine Jennings在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1443年在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞被列为bishop of worcester。他去世于1476年在英国賀特福爾享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦比曉普斯蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Carpenter 'The Younger' was born in 1410, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Carpenter, was 76 and his mother, Christina De Bailleul, was 73. He married Katherine Jennings in 1439, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. In 1443, at the age of 33, his occupation is listed as bishop of worcester in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1476, in Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Bishopsgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Carpenter 'The Younger' est né en 1410, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Carpenter, avait 76 ans et sa mère, Christina De Bailleul, avait 73 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Jennings en 1439, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. En 1443, à l’âge de 33 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est bishop of worcester à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1476, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Bishopsgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Carpenter 'The Younger' 1410 in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Carpenter 76 und seine Mutter Christina De Bailleul 73. Er hat 1439 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Jennings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1443, als er 33 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als bishop of worcester in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1476 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Bishopsgate, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Carpenter 'The Younger' è nato il nel 1410 nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Carpenter, aveva 76 anni e il suo madre, Christina De Bailleul, aveva 73 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Jennings nel 1439, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1443, all'età di 33 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come bishop of worcester nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1476, nel Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Bishopsgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Carpenter 'The Younger'が1410年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Carpenterは76歳，母Christina De Bailleulは73歳であった。1439年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでKatherine Jenningsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1443年，33歳の時，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーでの職業はbishop of worcesterと記録されている。彼は1476年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンビショプスガトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Carpenter 'The Younger'(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Carpenter(은)는 76세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina De Bailleul(은)는 73세였다. 그는 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Katherine Jennings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1443년, 33세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 bishop of worcester이었다. 그는 1476년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 비숍스가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Carpenter 'The Younger' nasceu em 1410, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Carpenter, tinha 76 anos e sua mãe, Christina De Bailleul, tinha 73 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Jennings em 1439, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1443, com 33 anos, sua profissão aparece como bishop of worcester em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1476, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Carpenter 'The Younger' родился в 1410 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Carpenter было 76 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina De Bailleul, 73. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Jennings в 1439 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1443 году, в возрасте 33 лет,  он работал по профессии bishop of worcester в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1476 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности бишопсгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Carpenter 'The Younger' nació en 1410, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Carpenter, tenía 76 años y su mamá, Christina De Bailleul, tenía 73 años. Se casó con Katherine Jennings en 1439, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. En 1443, a la edad de 33 años, su ocupación registrada era bishop of worcester en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1476, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
